title: Profile Settings
subtitle: Manage your training profile and metrics
name: Name
stravaAccountDisconnected: Your Strava account is currently disconnected.
disconnectGarminConfirm: This removes your Garmin session. Wellness, sleep and HRV data will stop syncing until you reconnect.
profileUpdateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
connectGarminHint: Connect your Garmin account to sync sleep, training readiness, and wellness data.
garminPasswordNotice: Your password is only used once to sign in and is never stored.
garminConnectError: Could not connect. Check your credentials and try again.
garminMfaHint: Enter the 2FA code from your authenticator app.
stravaNoZones: Strava did not return any predefined heart rate or power zones for your profile.
failedToLoadZones: Failed to load zones from Strava. You can still use manual metrics below.
ftpHint: Your FTP is the maximum power you can sustain for approximately one hour. This is used to calculate training zones and metrics like TSS and IF.
ftpRequiredWarning: FTP is required to calculate TSS, IF, and other power-based metrics
eftpMinHint: Minimum effort duration (3–30 min) used to estimate eFTP from activities (intervals.icu-style). Default 5 min.
weightHint: Your weight is used to calculate power-to-weight ratio and other performance metrics.
lthrHint: Used to estimate TSS for activities without power data (e.g. heart rate only). LTHR + Max HR + Resting HR are used for HRSS (intervals.icu-style) on the PMC chart.
maxHrHint: Used with Resting HR and LTHR for HR-based TSS (HRSS) on activities without power. Leave blank if you only use power.
restingHrHint: Measure in the morning before getting up. Used with Max HR and LTHR for HRSS on the PMC chart.
genderHint: Used in HRSS (TRIMP) formula for activities without power (e.g. male / female).
proTipText: To get an accurate FTP value, perform a 20-minute maximum effort test and use 95% of your average power. Alternatively, use a ramp test or get a lab test for the most accurate results. Update your FTP every 4-6 weeks as your fitness improves.
rpeFeedbackHint: After marking a session done, ask for a quick perceived-effort rating. It feeds the recommendation engine so repeated hard days can be eased off.
garminAutoSyncHint: Garmin wellness, sleep and HRV data is pulled automatically at the times you set below (your local time).
garminAutoSyncNoTimes: No times set — add one below.
